title: War Bond Rollover
description: A pile of maturing war bonds needs a home. Dull as dishwater, safe as houses. Your board will yawn — and sleep soundly.

title: GI Bill Mortgage Pool
description: Every returning soldier wants a little house with a white fence. Lend to the boom — America is buying lawns.

title: Struggling Regional Bank
description: A tired little bank two towns over — weak management, but a deposit base fat as a Thanksgiving turkey. Buy it cheap, run it better.

title: Auto Plant Expansion
description: Detroit wants to pour more steel on wheels. Big iron, big payroll, big order book. Cyclical — but the cycle is up.

title: Wildcat Oil Play
description: A Texan in ostrich boots swears there's a gusher under his ranch. Could be a fortune. Could be a dry hole and a good story.

title: Suburban Shopping Center
description: Strip mall on the new highway. Everyone's moving past the city line. Park once, buy everything. The future has a parking lot.

title: Railroad Refinancing
description: An old railroad wants to roll its debt. Proud name, rusting track. The dividends are real; so is the decline. Pick your decade.

title: Appliance Maker Credit Line
description: Every kitchen wants a humming refrigerator and a television glow. Finance the factory that fills them — consumer America, on the installment plan.

title: Eurodollar Placement
description: Dollars stranded in London, hunting a yield Regulation Q won't allow at home. Clever. Offshore. Faintly thrilling.

title: BankAmericard Rollout
description: A plastic card that lets people spend money they don't quite have yet. Madness — or the most profitable madness of the century.

title: Defense Contractor Bridge
description: Cost-plus contracts, Cold War urgency, a government that always pays. Boring, lucrative, and just a little bit grim.
